description.content: By passing in the appropriate options, you can search for available feed connections in the system.

query.description: Page number which specifies the set of records to retrieve. By default the number of the records per set is 10. Example - https://api.xero.com/bankfeeds.xro/1.0/FeedConnections?page=1 to get the second set of the records. When page value is not a number or a negative number, by default, the first set of records is returned.
Page size which specifies how many records per page will be returned (default 10). Example - https://api.xero.com/bankfeeds.xro/1.0/FeedConnections?pageSize=100 to specify page size of 100.

response.name: search results matching criteria returned with pagination and items array

The Bank Feeds API is a closed API that is only available to financial institutions that have an established financial services partnership with Xero. If you're an existing financial services partner that wants access, contact your local Partner Manager. If you're a financial institution who wants to provide bank feeds to your business customers, contact us to become a financial services partner.

Contact Support:
 Name: Xero Platform Team
 Email: api@xero.com
